description:
Fix Map Pin Location on Contact Page

Correct the map marker coordinates on the contact page Leaflet map to point to the accurate business address.

Requirements:
- Identify the current coordinates being used for the map pin
- Verify the correct address and obtain accurate latitude/longitude coordinates
- Update the Leaflet map marker with correct coordinates
- Ensure the map view is properly centered on the correct location
- Set appropriate zoom level for clear location visibility
- Verify the correct address is displayed in any associated text/labels
- Test that the pin appears at the correct physical location when compared to the actual address
- Consider adding a popup or tooltip to the marker showing the correct address for user confirmation
